content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_ServiceTickets
-- drop view v_ServiceTickets
as
SELECT      distinct AC.ORNO AS [Ticket Number]
,           AC.RESP as [Responsible]
,           AL.AOST as [Status]
,           AL.RSCD as [Trans Reason Code]
,           CASE WHEN AL.RSCD IN ('T10', 'TST', 'ZZZ', '') THEN 'NA' ELSE CS.TX40 end as [Trans Reason]
,           AL.BANO as [Serial Number]
,           COALESCE(OC.CUNO, ARC.Customer, OC2.CUNO) as [Customer ID]
,           COALESCE(OC.CUNM, ARC.Name, OC2.CUNM) as [Customer Name]
,           AC.ORDT as [Ticket Date]
,           AC.RLDT as [Requested Date]
,           AL.AORQ as [Service Qty]
,           ML.FLNO as [Item Number]
,           BIM.[Description]
,           BIM.[Sub-Brand]
,           BIM.Brand
,           BIM.[Finance Brand]
,           BIM.Division
,           BIM.[Business Unit]
,           BIM.[Item Type]
,           BIM.[Manufactured or Purchased]
,           COALESCE(NULLIF(LEFT(MO.BRE2, 10),''), SM.[SalesOrder]) as [Sales Order Number]
,           COALESCE(NULLIF(OH.ORDT,''), SM.OrderDate)  as [Sales Order Date]
,           BIM.[Supplier Code] as [Supplier ID]
,           BIM.[Supplier Short Name] as [Supplier Name]
,           MP.PUPR as [Service Amount]
FROM        M3.ACUORH AC
JOIN        M3.ACUORL AL on AC.ORNO = AL.ORNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.MILOIN ML on AL.BANO = ML.SERN
LEFT JOIN   M3.MILOMA MO on AL.BANO = MO.BANO
LEFT JOIN   M3.OOHEAD OH on LEFT(MO.BRE2, 10) = OH.ORNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.OCUSMA OC ON OH.CUNO = OC.CUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.OCUSMA OC2 ON AC.CUNO = OC2.CUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.CSYTAB CS ON AL.RSCD = CS.STKY and STCO = 'RSCD'

LEFT JOIN   SCA.SorDetailSerRep SDS on AL.BANO = SDS.Serial
LEFT JOIN   SCA.SorMaster SM on SDS.SalesOrder = SM.SalesOrder
LEFT JOIN   SCA.ArCustomer ARC on SM.Customer = ARC.Customer
/*
LEFT JOIN   SCA.InvMaster IM ON ML.FLNO = IM.StockCode
LEFT JOIN   SCA.ApSupplier SU on IM.Supplier = SU.Supplier
*/
LEFT JOIN   M3.MITMAS MM on ML.FLNO = MM.ITNO
LEFT JOIN   BI_ItemMaster BIM on ML.FLNO = BIM.[Item Number]
LEFT JOIN   M3.CIDMAS CM on MM.SUNO = CM.SUNO
LEFT JOIN   M3.MPLIRE MPL ON AL.BANO = MPL.BANO and MPL.BANO <> 'NO SERIAL NUMBER'
LEFT JOIN   M3.MPLINE MP ON MP.PUNO = MPL.PUNO AND MP.PNLI = MPL.PNLI AND MP.PNLS = MPL.PNLS
